LanguageData.SlaveQuest.UI.SuccessQuest: '{0}' expresses their gratitude. You have received {1}.
LanguageData.SlaveQuest.UI.MapRemoved: The settlement has been removed; the quest has ended.
LanguageData.SlaveQuest.UI.CantAcceptQuest: There are no slaves who satisfied requirements.
LanguageData.SlaveQuest.UI.Text.PrisonerArrive: There's some prisoner that break the will target
LanguageData.SlaveQuest.UI.Text.CollectorArrive: People arrived from (0) to retrieve the slaves.
LanguageData.SlaveQuest.Config.QuestGenerateRate_Cont: Sets how often contract quests occur
LanguageData.SlaveQuest.Config.QuestGenerateRate_Brea: Sets how often break the will quests occur
LanguageData.SlaveQuest.Config.DefaultValue.Label: Default
LanguageData.SlaveQuest.Config.Reset.Label: Reset
